query: We want to self-host Llama 3 8B on our EKS cluster for a product feature. What inference stack should we run, and should we use GPU or Inferentia?
Set up distributed fine-tuning of a 70B model on EKS across multiple nodes with EFA and checkpointing to FSx for Lustre.
Deploy vLLM with Ray Serve on EKS to serve Mistral with autoscaling — how should the Karpenter NodePools and model storage be configured?
We're spending too much on g6 GPU inference for our production LLM. Can we migrate serving to Inferentia2 on EKS, and what's the integration effort?
How do I wire DCGM and Prometheus/Grafana to observe GPU utilization and vLLM token latency (TTFT) on our EKS cluster?
Stand up a LiteLLM gateway on EKS that routes between our self-hosted Qwen and Claude on Bedrock with per-tenant cost tracking.
Build an agentic AI app on EKS using Strands Agents with self-hosted models plus Bedrock for reasoning — where does each piece run?
We need a RAG pipeline on EKS — which vector store should we use and how do we serve the embeddings and the LLM cost-efficiently?
What VPC CNI mode and subnet sizing should we use for a general-purpose multi-AZ EKS cluster?
Should we use EKS Pod Identity or IRSA, and what PodDisruptionBudget settings for our production web services?
Produce an architecture design document and an ADR for our new multi-tenant EKS platform.
Generate the Terraform to provision an EKS cluster with Karpenter and the AWS Load Balancer Controller.
Give our app teams self-service golden paths to deploy services on EKS via Backstage and ArgoCD.
Set up progressive delivery with Argo Rollouts and multi-stage promotion for our internal developer platform.
We just want a managed LLM API with no infrastructure to run — should we just use Amazon Bedrock?
How do I fine-tune a model using Amazon SageMaker training jobs?
What's the EKS security baseline and CIS hardening for a regulated cluster — Pod Identity, PSA restricted, GuardDuty, encryption?
